mapper.select: /* RwdMgmtMapper.getRwdProdList */ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS rwdProdCd , A.RATE_NM AS rwdProdNm , A.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt , B.ETC1 AS rwdTypeCd FROM MSP_RATE_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0258' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND #{trtmDt} BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DT AND A.APPL_END_DT ORDER BY B.ETC6

/* RwdMgmtMapper.getPrdtListByPrdtNm */ SELECT C.RWD_PROD_CD AS rwdProdCd , D.RATE_NM AS rwdProdNm , B.MNFCT_NM AS mnfctNm , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID AS rprsPrdtId , A.PRDT_CODE AS prdtCode , A.PRDT_NM AS prdtNm FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , ORG_MNFCT_MST B , MSP_RWD_MST C , MSP_RATE_MST D WHERE A.RPRS_YN ='Y' AND A.MNFCT_ID = B.MNFCT_ID AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01' AND UPPER(A.PRDT_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{prdtNm}) ||'%' AND C.RWD_PROD_CD = #{rwdProdCd} AND C.RWD_PROD_CD = D.RATE_CD AND #{trtmDt} BETWEEN D.APPL_STRT_DT AND D.APPL_END_DT ORDER BY A.MNFCT_ID, A.PRDT_CODE, A.PRDT_NM

/* RwdMgmtMapper.getChgRwdCombo */ SELECT A.RWD_PROD_CD AS value , C.RATE_NM AS text FROM MSP_RWD_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.RWD_PROD_CD = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0258' AND A.RWD_PROD_CD = C.RATE_CD AND A.USE_YN = #{useYn} ORDER BY ETC6
